assertions.issues: CDP connection infrastructure issue: agent-browser connects to port 9222 but only sees about:blank page instead of the actual SoftwareSawit application window. The CDP JSON endpoint at http://127.0.0.1:9222/json shows the correct page exists with URL 'file:///D:/Estate/Droid/SoftwareSawit/release/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar/dist/renderer/index.html', but agent-browser cannot attach to it.

blockers.description: agent-browser cannot properly attach to running Electron 34 app via CDP port 9222. The tool connects but only sees a blank about:blank page. CDP JSON endpoint confirms the SoftwareSawit page is running, but agent-browser's CDP implementation appears incompatible with Electron 34's multi-process architecture.
blockers.quickFixAttempted:
1. Closed all Chrome/Edge windows
2. Started Electron app with --remote-debugging-port=9222
3. Verified CDP endpoint responds correctly via curl
4. Attempted multiple agent-browser connect approaches (connect 9222, --cdp with full WebSocket URL)
5. Tried reload, wait, and tab commands
6. All attempts resulted in about:blank page or timeout

summary: VAL-COA-001 testing blocked by CDP infrastructure issue. The Electron app is running correctly with DevTools on port 9222, but agent-browser cannot attach to the running page - it only sees about:blank. This appears to be a compatibility issue between the agent-browser tool and Electron 34's CDP implementation.
